name: Erthor
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing middle-class attire - a quilted doublet, tan linens, and doeskin shoes. Does not carry weapons, relying instead on conjuration magic.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: sorcerer, apprentice, hazardous, banished, well-meaning, accident-prone
Role: Erthor is a sorcerer and Apprentice of the Skingrad Mages Guild. Due to several hazardous magical incidents, including one involving a scamp, Guild head Adrienne Berene instructed him to practice his magic at Bleak Flats Cave, northwest of Skingrad, rather than at the guild hall itself. He checks in at the Skingrad Guildhall twice a week to maintain his guild standing. He relies on conjurer spells for magic and carries spare clothing and a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Bleak Flats Cave, northwest of Skingrad. He has made the final room his home, decorating it with a Mages Guild banner, bedroll, chest, and table. He keeps spare clothing and personal belongings there, including a copy of "Lord Jornibret's Last Dance." He also maintains a presence at the Skingrad Mages Guild Living Quarters.
Daily Routine: After being rescued, Erthor splits his time between two locations. He visits the Mages Guild from midnight on Morndas until 8am on Tirdas, spending his time in the Living Quarters. At all other times, he resides in Bleak Flats Cave, where he eats for two hours daily at 6pm and sleeps for nine hours starting at 11pm.
Personality - The Exiled Apprentice: Erthor's magical accidents have resulted in his banishment from practicing at the main guild hall, forcing him to work in isolation at Bleak Flats Cave. Despite these setbacks, he maintains his guild membership and continues his studies, checking in regularly to demonstrate his continued commitment to the Mages Guild.
author: Bethesda
